tasks.label: run-apples-inline-main
args: import benchmark_apples_to_apples_40 as b; b.main(); print('done')

tasks.label: check-python-procs
tasks.command: Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,CPU,StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: check-python-active
tasks.command: Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,CPU,StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: bench40-reliability-run
tasks.command: Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item benchmark_40_tuned_results.json,benchmark_40_tuned_progress.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; C:/Users/edwar/Desktop/linear-trend-spotter/linear-trend-spotter/.venv/Scripts/python.exe benchmark_40_tuned.py

tasks.command: Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,CPU,StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize
